_publications._publicationTitle: A novel imaging-compatible sciatic nerve schwannoma model.

_contextSnippet: the doubling times were quite similar between the 3 groups (18, 16 and 24 days in 30,000, 100,000 and 300,000 groups, respectively)
details: Tumor doubling times were 18, 16 and 24 days for 30,000, 100,000 and 300,000 cell groups, respectively
